news.title:
Macquarie revises target prices for steel majors like Tata Steel, JSW Steel, Hindalco, and Jindal Steel, highlighting strong Q4FY26 EBITDA due to robust domestic demand and rebounding prices.
JSW Steel is Macquarie's top pick with a Rs 1,353 target, while Hindalco, Jindal Steel, Coal India, and Tata Steel receive updated ratings reflecting mixed sectoral prospects and input cost challenges.
news.summary:
Macquarie revises target prices for steel majors like Tata Steel, JSW Steel, Hindalco, and Jindal Steel, highlighting strong Q4FY26 EBITDA due to robust domestic demand and rebounding prices.
JSW Steel is Macquarie's top pick with a Rs 1,353 target, while Hindalco, Jindal Steel, Coal India, and Tata Steel receive updated ratings reflecting mixed sectoral prospects and input cost challenges.

news.title:
Kush Bohra shares stock picks like Tata Power, Laurus Labs, Apollo Hospitals, with buy/sell calls and targets.
He highlights Tata Steel, Jindal Steel for bullish outlook; cautions sector rotation into financials.
news.summary:

news.title:
Ruchit Jain of Motilal Oswal recommends Jindal Steel and Ather Energy stocks for short-term gains.
Sensex rose 2,988.8 pts (4%) and Nifty 890.3 pts (3.9%) as crude prices eased; RBI holds rates at 5.25%.
news.summary:

news.title:
Metal stocks gain 22% since March lows; Lloyds Metals & Nalco lead gains.
Analysts predict up to 18% upside for Jindal Steel, Nalco, NMDC amid market momentum.

This move ensures operational continuity despite supply disruptions.

news.title:

Its DRI plant uses syngas, reducing coal imports and emissions.

news.title:
Ajit Mishra of Religare Broking suggests strategies for BSE, Jindal Steel, and Asian Paints amid market volatility.
BSE shows bullish strength, Jindal Steel indicates uptrend, and Asian Paints faces bearish pressure with downside potential.

news.title:
Steelmakers expect strong Q4FY26 earnings due to rising domestic prices, falling imports, and robust demand.
Tata Steel and Jindal Steel may benefit from improved spreads, despite LNG supply risks affecting JSW Steel.

news.title:
SC to decide if coke breeze qualifies for customs duty exemption, impacting steelmakers like Jindal Steel.
Conflicting CESTAT rulings have led to SC intervention; decision could reshape tax costs for steelmakers.
news.summary:
SC to decide if coke breeze qualifies for customs duty exemption, impacting steelmakers like Jindal Steel.
Conflicting CESTAT rulings have led to SC intervention; decision could reshape tax costs for steelmakers.

news.title:
Emkay favors SAIL, Jindal Steel in ferrous, Vedanta in non-ferrous; highlights rising steel prices due to geopolitical tensions.
Aluminium benefits from supply disruption; Vedanta poised for gains. Nifty Metal index fell 11% since Mar 2026 but shows resilience.
news.summary:

news.title:
SPJ True Realtyy awards a structural steel contract for its Vedatam project in Gurugram to Jindal Steel & Power.
The commercial development spans 4.15 acres and features 1.2 million sq. ft. of space.

news.title:
BEL signed an MoU with RRP Group to boost defence tech; United Spirits sold RCSPL stake for ₹16,660 crore.

Prolonged statutory clearance processes and mineral block issues are key challenges.

news.title:
Jindal Steel named preferred bidder for 2 Odisha iron ore blocks, spanning 84 hectares with 38M tonnes.
Company committed 111.2% premium; blocks auctioned by Odisha Directorate of Mines in Dec 2025.

news.title:
Nifty Metal index gained 7.6% in February; Tata Steel, Adani Ent., Jindal Steel, Lloyds advanced 10-13%.

news.title:
Skyhigh Sustainable acquired 4.97 cr shares (4.87%) of Jindal Steel Ltd from Gagan Infraenergy Ltd.
Acquisition was an off-market transfer under SEBI regulations, maintaining total voting capital unchanged.
